description_long: This is a vintage-style suitcase with a rectangular, boxy shape and a dark brown, textured exterior that appears to be made of leather or a similar material. The suitcase features reinforced metal corners and edges, as well as visible rivets along the sides for added durability. On the front, there is a sturdy fixed handle made of matching material, flanked by two metal latches for securing the lid. The surface shows a slightly worn, matte finish, giving it an aged, classic appearance. No wheels, external pockets, or brand logos are visible on any side. The overall construction suggests it is designed for carrying personal belongings and can be opened and closed via the latches.
description: A vintage, dark brown rectangular suitcase with metal-reinforced corners, a fixed handle, and two metal latches. The surface is textured and matte, with no visible wheels, logos, or external pockets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the fixed handle and two metal latches, with reinforced corners and a textured brown surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the length of the suitcase, visible rivets, and the handle partially protruding from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the continuous brown surface, metal corner reinforcements, and rivets, with no handle or latches visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length and rivets, with the handle partially visible on the right.
